name: C_poseblend_full
description: Dump mode exposes skeleton and local/world poses.

test.command: [[result=0,stdout="^[\s\S]*SKELETON root=- spine=root hand=spine[\s\S]*LOCAL hand[\s\S]*WORLD hand[\s\S]*time 0.500[\s\S]*$"]]--dump --fade full.pose all

io_hint: Dump real parsed hierarchy and sampled pose data; do not replace animation with fixed output.
